budget_note: ROADMAP 1.5s refers to visible/usable content, not API-only latency.

methodology.cold_goto: Fresh authenticated context per route (new browser.newContext() + login). Login may warm shared assets; not a zero-HTTP-cache claim.
methodology.warm_goto: Same warmed authenticated context, hard navigation.
methodology.soft_nav: Same warmed context; Overview soft-nav starts from /dashboard/status.
methodology.skeleton: Observed in parallel with heading; headingAt never waits on skeleton timeout.
methodology.lcp: PerformanceObserver buffered LCP on hard nav only; soft_nav lcp_ms=null. On first Railway run, verify hard-nav LCP is non-null (observer may still miss if read before a final candidate).
